name: New Skill Request
about: Propose a new Skill or submit one you have already written

labels: new-skill
assignees: ''

## Skill Information

**Discipline category**: (e.g. 07-economics, 03-mathematics)

**Proposed skill name** (kebab-case): (e.g. `did-causal`, `bayesian-stats`)

**PRD priority**: P0 / P1 / P2

---

## Description

**What problem does it solve?**
> Describe what task this Skill helps researchers complete.

**Target users**:
> Which researchers will use this? (e.g. econometricians, fMRI analysts)

**Core methods / tools**:
> Which statistical methods, tools, or APIs does it use?

---

## Duplicate Check

- [ ] Searched existing Skills — confirmed no substantial overlap
- Related existing Skills (if any):

## Contributor Info

**Do you plan to write this Skill yourself?**
- [ ] Yes, I plan to submit a PR within [ ] days
- [ ] No, proposing only
